title: 金鯱賞の後に・再起、躍進

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What a stunning race! Silence Suzuka wowed
every single spectator here today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She comes running toward me as she leaves the
crowd's cheers behind.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka! You were A-MA-ZING out there!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I had a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It felt like the whole world fell silent—everything
but the wind and my heartbeat...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Just like the first time I ever raced.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I think it was even more peaceful and
beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her so happy and excited, I end up with a
big smile of my own.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We should have a party back at the dorm! We
gotta celebrate Suzuka having such a fun race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I notice a figure standing at the tunnel
entrance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Silence Suzuka's performance in today's
Kinko Sho has lit an unexpected fire in the hearts
of some of the other Umamusume.
